task_input.question: Did our paper trade perform overnight?
task_input.context: We have a bot that was supposed to paper trade; need overnight PnL.

reasoning: Plan: (1) locate the bot log file for the relevant time window; (2) parse fills/positions; (3) compute realized PnL (paired exits) and mark-to-mid unrealized PnL; (4) report trade count, markets, and any selection failures. Risk: missing logs or missing pricing; fallback to last mid in logs.

observation.notes: Selection frequently returned no mention markets. Most activity clustered on one ticker.

reflection: The approach worked: we produced a correct MTM estimate and identified the real operational issue (market selection failing, not execution). Improvement: log a stable daily summary artifact (pnl + positions) as first-class output so future queries don't require digging into JSONL.
